metas.caption: The image shows a plate of food with a variety of ingredients. On the plate, there are several small, round, brown and white seashells arranged in a circular pattern. The shells appear to be cooked and have a glossy texture. They are surrounded by a bed of green leafy vegetables, possibly lettuce or arugula. The plate is white and has a textured surface. The background is blurred, but it appears to be a table or countertop.

The image shows a table with a variety of food items on it. On the left side of the table, there is a large pot of soup with a spoon in it. Next to the pot, there are two bowls of soup and a plate of sliced meat. The meat appears to be beef or pork, with a pinkish-red color and a shiny texture. The plate is garnished with chopped herbs and red chili flakes. 

On the right side, on the bottom right corner, there comes a small bowl of yellow and green vegetables, possibly lettuce or spinach. There is also a blue plate with white rice

The image shows two young women standing in front of a table with a large cake on it. The cake is a three-tiered cake with a yellow frosting and a white base. The women are wearing white dresses and are smiling at the camera. Behind them, there is a large arch made of gold and silver balloons with the words "Happy Birthday" written on them. The arch is decorated with pink and white flowers and greenery. The background is blurred, but it appears to be a room with a window and a chandelier. The overall mood of the image is festive and celebratory.

The image shows a black frying pan with a dish in it. The dish appears to be a type of meat or beef dish, with pieces of meat and vegetables mixed in with a dark sauce. The meat is cooked to a golden brown color and looks tender and juicy. There are also sliced tomatoes, asparagus, and mushrooms scattered throughout the dish. On the left side of the pan, there are two small onions and a few garlic cloves. The sauce is a dark brown color, likely from the spices used in the dish, and there is a sprig of rosemary on top. The image is a plain white background. It appears to be a simple, minimalistic image with no other elements or decorations. The image is centered in the middle of the image and has a smooth, clean surface. The background is a solid white color and there are no shadows or reflections on it.
